P

Hermine Delarue

Person · First seen 3312-01-08 · 5 mentions
Active: 3312-01-08 → 3312-03-27
Biography

Hermine Delarue serves as Executive Operative for Deep Space Surveys (DSS), an organisation with extensive experience supporting large-scale exploration efforts. In January 3312, Delarue issued a public call for mined and manufactured materials to support the Distant Worlds 3 expedition's construction of a new deep-space facility. She cited DSS's prior work on Explorers' Anchorage during Distant Worlds II as precedent and invited independent pilots to help lay foundations for the next era of deep-space discovery. Her leadership in coordinating community-funded frontier infrastructure has established a model for how exploration organisations can crowdsource construction materials.

Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3312-03-27
Exploration Data Initiative for Rainbow’s End Concludes Successfully
Rainbow's End exploration data initiative concludes successfully. Stellar survey targets exceeded. Station in Roefoo ZE-H d10-0 now open as frontier exploration hub.
3312-03-20
Exploration Data Requested for New Deep-Space Station
Distant Worlds 3 logistics fleet completes Rainbow's End deep-space station in Roefoo ZE-H d10-0. Calls for exploration data to seed modelling systems. Station opens March 3312.
3312-02-13
Distant Worlds 3 Expedition Marks Major Milestones on Route
Distant Worlds 3 reports major milestones including Colonia regrouping, hazardous surface landing near white dwarf Spoihaae XE-X d2-9, Seldowitch Nebula surveys, and DSSA carrier discovery. Fleet bound for Beagle Point.
3312-01-17
Distant Worlds Expedition Preparations Conclude Successfully
The Distant Worlds construction material appeal concludes successfully, with target quotas for power generators, bertrandite, and thermal cooling units met ahead of schedule. Hermine Delarue confirms the site has been surveyed and deep-range survey systems will be calibrated. Timotheus Haddard praises the coordinated response from haulers and escort wings. Contributing pilots may collect rewards at Surveyor's Reach in Alrai. The Distant Worlds III expedition is set to depart from NGC 1981 Sector ZU-Y d27 on January 18th.
3312-01-08
Third Distant Worlds Expedition Requests Materials for Deep-Space Infrastructure Project
The Distant Worlds working group issues a community appeal for mined and manufactured materials to construct a new deep-space facility beyond established survey routes. Executive Operative Hermine Delarue and quartermaster Timotheus Haddard outline the initial requirements, inviting independent pilots to deliver bromellite, power generators, and thermal cooling units to Surveyor's Reach in Alrai in exchange for rewards including a class 5 pre-engineered cargo rack.
